{"society_power": 4.0, "state_power": 4.0, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "1977 National Civic Strike amid Paper Leviathan and rising insurgency", "reasoning": "Urbanization, union/student militancy, and the massive 1977 general strike modestly strengthened societal mobilization capacity despite National Front demobilization; meanwhile guerrilla expansion (M-19, FARC, ELN), the illicit drug economy, and reliance on state-of-siege rule eroded the state's real territorial and fiscal control, keeping it a weak \"Paper Leviathan.\""}
